verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Remember Joshua led an awesome battle Marched around the city seven times The walls came down and victory gave him honor 'Cause he knew all along that God would lead his fight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Are you tired of fighting, weary soldier? Lay your weapon down and rest a while I know your tired and weary from your battle So lay back in God's arms and rest tonight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're beaten by the raging war inside you You're stumblin' cause your steps are getting weak Your head hangs low though a tiny smile escapes you In your eyes surrender's all I see

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Her heart is breaking as she holds him tightly This war won't last much longer she can see She knows the final surrender won't come easy So, she prays for strength, and whispers softly "Now you're free"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I know you're tired and weary from your battle, So, lay back in God's arms and rest tonight, So, lay back in God's arms and rest tonight.
